steps.title: Separate the first book
steps.content: The first book costs $18$. If $x$ books are purchased, then the number of books after the first is $x-1$.

steps.title: Add the remaining book cost
steps.content:
Each book after the first costs $15$, so those books cost $15(x-1)$. Add the first-book cost.
$$y=15(x-1)+18$$
The answer is C.
